query:
INSERT INTO `accountPermissions` (`accountId`, `permission`) 
SELECT id, '/' FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test', 'sales_test', 'finance_test', 'teacher_test', 'customer_test', 'partner_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/orders' FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test', 'sales_test', 'finance_test', 'partner_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/customers' FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test', 'sales_test', 'teacher_test', 'customer_test', 'partner_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/sales' FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test', 'sales_test', 'partner_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/schedules' FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test', 'sales_test', 'teacher_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/teachers' FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/cities' FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/finance' FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test', 'finance_test', 'partner_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/reconciliation-match' FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test', 'finance_test', 'partner_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/import' FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/gmail-import' FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/parsing-learning' FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/accounts' FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test');
